ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Full name of the measurement (e.g., Northward Sea Ice Velocity) */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., m s-1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the measurement methodology and reporting guidelines */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used for the measurement */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "environmental_correction" TEXT /* Description of any environmental corrections applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement associated with the dataset */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the dataset */,
  "collection_year" INTEGER /* Year in which the data was collected */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "metadata_file" TEXT /* File path to the metadata file containing additional details about the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset to track updates */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the principal investigator responsible for the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliated institution or organization */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access */,
  "reason_for_access" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality report */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement associated with the quality report */,
  "reported_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who reported the issue */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality report */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of any issues found in the measurement data */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the issue resolution (e.g., resolved, pending) */,
  "correction_method" TEXT /* Method used to correct the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reported_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation record */,
  "measurement_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first measurement */,
  "measurement_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second measurement */,
  "correlation_coefficient" REAL /* Calculated correlation coefficient between the two measurements */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the correlation was analyzed */,
  "分析方法" TEXT /* Method used for correlation analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_correlations_measurement_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id_1") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_correlations_measurement_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id_2") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., m s-1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit's use in measurements */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Factor to convert to standard units (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)
